amendments.text: (a) The shock absorbing elements in main, nose, and tail wheel units must be substantiated by the tests specified in Secs. 23.723. (b) The shock absorbing ability of the landing gear during taxiing must be shown in the operational tests required by Sec. 23.235. 64-17; Issued on 03/25/64. --> Link to eCFR --> NPRM ACTIONS:   Notice of Proposed Rulemaking. Notice No. 64-17; Issued on 03/25/64. 4080; Issued on 09/28/64. --> Link to eCFR --> FINAL RULE ACTIONS:   Final Rule. Docket No. 4080; Issued on 09/28/64.
